meta.label: Mexican • Dishes Catalog
meta.description: Planner-friendly dish definitions for Mexican cuisine: street foods, stews, salsas, sides, breakfasts, and desserts. Designed for SSA meal planning, browse, and search indexes.
meta.author: SSA Catalog Curation

notes: All dish ids/tags follow SSA safe-id patterns (lowercase, dots/underscores/hyphens).
Equipment/technique/ingredient ids are canonical placeholders; map to your actual SSA catalogs as needed.

adapt.notes: Roast marinated pork on a sheet pan; broil for char; finish with pineapple.
